_notes: Charges apply per additional lot created (not the original lot).
Residential charges are per dwelling/lot above the existing entitlement.
Charges are indexed quarterly by BCC and payable at DA approval.
BCC has two charge areas: Urban Area and Township Area — most Brisbane suburbs are Urban.
Infrastructure charges are separate from: DA fees, headworks, and council levies.
Infrastructure charge schedule was restructured in 2024 under the LGIP review.
Rates below are indicative 2026 estimates from the BCC LGIP charge schedule.

default_charge.label: Conservative estimate — charge area not determinable
